steps.name: grade1-problem-contract
steps.summary: Implemented Grade 1 mission template contract and safe fallback in src/lib/grade1-problems.ts.

steps.name: alpha-mission-bank
steps.summary: Added 24 deterministic Alpha mission templates across the Grade 1 adventure islands.

steps.name: data-driven-adventure-ui
steps.summary: Replaced the static Grade 1 flow with data-driven map, mission card, visual renderers, and reward surfaces.

steps.name: progress-and-review-loop
steps.summary: Added localStorage progress, review tracking, storage recovery, and direct reward-to-next continuation.

steps.name: grade1-quality-gates
steps.summary: Added validate:grade1, focused unit coverage, and Playwright E2E for Grade 1 route, hint, reward, recovery, and next-mission flow.
